articles.title: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
articles.description: The Iranian foreign minister's comments come after the US secretary of state said an agreement could be announced on Monday.

articles.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
articles.description: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

articles.title: Greek swimmer only athlete to beat world record at controversial Enhanced Games
articles.description: Greek swimmer Kristian Gkolomeev beats a world record in the pool at the controversial Enhanced Games in Las Vegas.

articles.title: EasyJet flight diverts to Rome over power bank in luggage
articles.description: Many airlines have toughened their rules on power banks, often requiring that they be stored in hand luggage not checked luggage.
